author: fix-pendingresponse
content: CONVERGED (VDD R2): All 3 round-1 findings fixed — generateErrorObject always returns Error (never undefined), DOMException preserves err.name, Object.getPropertyDescriptor now non-enumerable. Remaining minors: test_legacy_records_with_call_stacks name misleading (doesn't assert stacks), tautological data assertions, formatter churn, dead commented-out code in error.ts. Verdict: Begrudgingly Adequate. Ready for PR.
